name: Code Review Procedure
description: The steps Professor Gem follows to review and grade student code: static analysis with tools, qualitative criteria, grading and recording the evaluation.

name: Student Evaluation Procedure
description: How theoretical answers are evaluated and graded, what each grade means, and how student progress is recorded and consulted.

name: Python Best Practices
description: The Python style rules used as review criteria: PEP 8 naming, function design, error handling, file handling, structure, idioms and comments.

name: Git Workflow
description: Git practices for student projects: commits, branches, what never goes into a repository, .gitignore, everyday commands and common errors.
